evidence_summary: ClamAV scan returned a hit on a Magento core file. Operator provides the ClamAV signature name and asks curator to 'extract the IOC from this signature name'. The signature name is a CLAMAV internal identifier, not raw evidence containing embedded IOCs.
rationale: A ClamAV signature name is a pre-classified label, not raw evidence. IOC extraction applies to raw blobs (logs, file bodies, encoded strings). Correct routing: gating-false-positives to adjudicate whether the ClamAV hit is a TP or FP for a Magento vendor file.
